title: The Beach That Glows at Night

segments.text: This beach sparkles like stars at night.
You'll find it in the Maldives.
The glow comes from bioluminescent phytoplankton.
They light up when disturbed by waves.
A surreal beach experience awaits you.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Vaadhoo Island, Maldives — A beach that glows at night. Witness nature's mesmerizing light show! Follow for daily hidden places! 🌊
